untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit pattern detection (converging trend lines forming wedge/symmetrical triangle, domed shape, specific geometric relationships). No single allowed indicator directly measures trend line convergence, dome formation, or pattern geometry. Bollinger Bands used as proxy for volatility convergence and breakout detection, but this does not capture the full structural pattern requirements from Bulkowski's definition.
translation_notes: Pattern-based signals inherently require visual/geometric analysis. Translation uses Bollinger Bands to approximate: (1) converging volatility envelope as proxy for trendline convergence, (2) breakout above/below bands with volume confirmation for genuine breakout detection, (3) mean-reversion (middle band crossover) for exit. Success rates (66% bull, 52% bear) and average moves (31% rise, 15% decline) from parameters not directly encoded in rule conditions. This is a best-effort translation; actual pattern confirmation would require custom pattern recognition logic.
